title: Affinity Humanity Angels
wikitext:
[]: Affinity Humanity-Angels             Quote Post by Undorian » Sun Dec 30, 2012 10:36 pm Hi there, Hitherto, I was pretty interested by this series, which led me to take a more careful look towards it. So I read most of the wiki on this website, but I actually still have one major question concerning a fact which still leaves me startled: According to Ritsuko humanity and the Angels (or at least Shamshel) have an accordance of DNA by more than 99%: But clearly, all angels (except for Adam, Lilith and Lilin), including Shamshel, are Adam's children while humanity represents Lilith's offspring. However, this collides with Darwins theory of natural evolution, as certain other species like apes show an affinity almost as close to humans as angels do. So either Darwins theory is wrong and humanity (Lilin) is Liliths direct descendant, not being related to apes, or, everything alive on this planet would count as Lilith's offspring, what means that Angels are not that closely related to humanity as everything else, what means that Ritsuko would have lied... Anyone knows an answer to that, because this is somehow killing me...

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Sun Dec 30, 2012 11:13 pm Both Lilith and Adam can be considered beings of the same species so their descendants are bound to have similar DNA. I think what is the most relevant here is which fruit they carry. It is implied that humans, and humans alone, bear the fruit of wisdom, so you could say that, even though they also descend from Lilith, other species that populate the planet were merely steps necessary to achieve the perfected form of "fruit of knowledge bearers" that are the Lilin. Adam's offspring on the other hand are bearers of the fruit of life, which is likely responsible for their alien morphology and abilities.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 30, 2012 11:15 pm My guess is that it works kind of like this: The First Ancestral Race were "humans" who thought that having more "humanity" in the galaxy was a good idea, so, using their biological template, they bioengineered creation gods called the Seeds of Life. The Seeds had two basic recipes for making new people that they could choose from: (A) Fruit of Life Version: What Adam's children are, a race of intrinsically humanoid gods. Something about their nature compels them to shapeshift away from human form prior to hatching, but if this did not happen, perhaps they might look like Adam or the Evas. (B) Fruit of Knowledge Version: Create the conditions for life to emerge from chemical building blocks and evolve from there. The aim is to generate a thriving biosphere, and for one of its species to eventually converge upon the humanoid form. If the souls of the FAR are emptied into the primordial soup at the start, this might (somehow) provide an explanation for how the convergence toward the FAR's physical form eventually occurs. It's a pretty bullshit explanation that would entail a bunch of alien souls having some kind of long-term metaphysical influence over evolution, but it's either that or Lilith using ATF magic from inside the Black Moon. "Guided evolution" does seem pretty implicit in the NGE universe and I don't think there's any way to escape it. Any which way, "99.89%" is pretty biologically naive, but at least they didn't go full Prometheus levels of retardation and have the DNA completely match.

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Mon Dec 31, 2012 1:41 am The Angels have mastered the mind-body relationship and so can take whatever form they chose, that is, their minds have decided how the world should be.

[]:             Quote Post by Oral Stage » Mon Dec 31, 2012 5:28 am [url]http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Human_genetic_variation#Single_nucleotide_polymorphisms[/url] This section of the Human Genetic Variation wiki claims that the permutations of base pairs in human DNA differ by about 0.1% when comparing one random and unrelated human to another. When you follow the sources back, it appears the relevant figures would have been around in the 90s. So the 99.89% match between Shamshel and Shinji would make a nice parallel to the 0.1% difference between Shinji and Touji.

[]:             Quote Post by Undorian » Mon Dec 31, 2012 9:53 am So, thanks for the replies, but actually I'm still confused: So: Angels possess the fruit of life <=> They are Adam's children. Humanity possesses the fruit of knowledge <=> They are Lilith's descendants. What's now with all the other organisms on Earth? I think, it is mentioned that they evolved from LCL, what means, they are Lilith's offspring too. But clearly, they do not possess the fruit of knowledge, like humanity does. And why are Angels so close to humans concerning their DNA? They do not even possess the same "fruit"...

[]:             Quote Post by Replicator » Mon Dec 31, 2012 10:12 am Undorian wrote: So, thanks for the replies, but actually I'm still confused: So: Angels possess the fruit of life <=> They are Adam's children. Humanity possesses the fruit of knowledge <=> They are Lilith's descendants. What's now with all the other organisms on Earth? I think, it is mentioned that they evolved from LCL, what means, they are Lilith's offspring too. But clearly, they do not possess the fruit of knowledge, like humanity does. And why are Angels so close to humans concerning their DNA? They do not even possess the same "fruit"...

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Mon Dec 31, 2012 1:02 pm Undorian wrote: What's now with all the other organisms on Earth? I think, it is mentioned that they evolved from LCL, what means, they are Lilith's offspring too. But clearly, they do not possess the fruit of knowledge, like humanity does. And why are Angels so close to humans concerning their DNA? They do not even possess the same "fruit"...
